name: @animagram/state-engine
description: Declarative state data management system for process

scripts.build:
wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir dist && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./dist/package.json'));p.name='@animagram/state-engine';p.version='0.1.0';fs.writeFileSync('./dist/package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2));fs.writeFileSync('./dist/README.md','# @animagram/state-engine

> ⚠️ This package is currently under development. API may change.

WASM binding for [state-engine](https://github.com/animagram-jp/state-engine).
')"
